# Retro Shirt Quiz

> Adivina la selección y el año de cada camiseta. Más de 175 equipaciones de selecciones nacionales de fútbol de todo el mundo y todas las épocas.

## About

Retro Shirt Quiz (Shirt Quiz) is a single-page web application (PWA) that challenges users to identify national football team kits from FIFA World Cups. The game offers three difficulty modes (Easy: 2000–present, Medium: 1970–1999, Hard: pre-1970) with score tracking, streak counting, and progressive image loading.

## URLs

- Main page: https://quiz-camisetas.moisesvalero.es/
- Privacy policy: https://quiz-camisetas.moisesvalero.es/privacidad
- Cookie policy: https://quiz-camisetas.moisesvalero.es/cookies
- Source code: https://github.com/moisesvalero/quiz-camisetas
- Data source: https://www.footballkitarchive.com/world-cup-kits-l308/

## Features

- Three difficulty modes: Modernas (2000+), Clásicas (1970–1999), Históricas (pre-1970)
- Three lives per game, streak bonuses
- Offline support via Service Worker (PWA)
- Installable as Progressive Web App (standalone mode on Android/iOS/Desktop)
- Canvases for confetti celebration on correct answers
- Audio feedback via Web Audio API (correct, incorrect, hint, game over)

## Technology stack

- Astro 7 (static site generation)
- Tailwind CSS v4
- TypeScript
- Vite
- Deployed on Vercel
